properties.titulo_evento: Doodle Labs eyes US, European production sites as demand soars for jam-resistant drones
properties.descricao: Doodle Labs hopes to turn its success in equipping jam-hardened drones in Ukraine into additional production sites in Europe and he United States.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel’s IAI unveils ‘Hypnosis’ system for confusing enemy drone swarms
properties.descricao: The system, called Hypnosis, consists of an array of mobile “stations” around a defended area that send out jamming signals against drone swarms.

properties.titulo_evento: Corruption Takes Center Stage in Ukraine’s National Conversation

properties.titulo_evento: China and Philippines trade accusations after sailor injured at sea
properties.descricao: Dispute erupts in South China Sea after incident near Second Thomas Shoal involving Chinese and Philippine vessels.

properties.titulo_evento: US military releases footage of tenth consecutive night of strikes on Iran
properties.descricao: US Central Command (CENTCOM) released footage of its forces launching the latest round of strikes against Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Who is driving diplomacy in the Horn of Africa and the Red Sea, and why?
properties.descricao: A series of diplomatic consultations in Cairo underscores the Horn of Africa's growing strategic importance.

properties.titulo_evento: Why protests are growing in Ukraine over defence leadership and dismissals
properties.descricao: Protests continue as anger grows over President Zelenskyy’s decision to fire the country’s defence minister.

properties.titulo_evento: US attacks Iran for 10th consecutive night
properties.descricao: Washington vows revenge for US military casualties, while Iran claims attacks on US sites across the region.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: Tehran attacks Gulf states, says 2 tankers in Hormuz on fire
properties.descricao: Explosions reported in Iran's Bandar Abbas, Qeshm Island, Chabahar and Konarak as US launches new wave of attacks.

properties.titulo_evento: MSF demands Israel release detained Palestinian healthcare workers
properties.descricao: The NGO is 'outraged' by Israel's treatment of the health professionals and warns that 'silence has become complicity'.

properties.titulo_evento: Suspect charged in fatal attack on UK politician Ann Widdecombe
properties.descricao: Police say a possible political motive is under investigation in the killing of the Reform UK figure.

properties.titulo_evento: War on Iran: War resumes 30 days after MoU
properties.descricao: 30 days into the US-Iran MoU the worst fighting in months has erupted threatening to unravel the ceasefire.

properties.titulo_evento: World Cup champions Spain return to royal welcome, parade through Madrid
properties.descricao: Tens of thousands of fans greet La Roja as they travel down Madrid's historic avenues to Cibeles Square.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump rejects Mamdani threat to arrest Israel’s Netanyahu for war crimes
properties.descricao: US president insists Netanyahu will not be arrested, despite ICC warrant.

properties.titulo_evento: Gaza residents weigh in on election of new Hamas leader
properties.descricao: Gaza residents weigh in on election of new Hamas leader

properties.titulo_evento: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks
properties.descricao: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.

properties.titulo_evento: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
properties.descricao: The US says the attacks were aimed at degrading Iran's capabilities to attack ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

properties.titulo_evento: Hamas names Khalil al-Hayya as new overall leader
properties.descricao: The Palestinian armed group's Qatar-based chief negotiator replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by Israeli forces in Gaza in 2024.

properties.titulo_evento: Ryanair profits drop as Iran war puts off passengers and lifts fuel costs
properties.descricao: The Irish airline said oil prices had increased costs meanwhile Brent crude surpassed $90.

properties.titulo_evento: Food delivery rider wins China's top literary prize
properties.descricao: Wang Jibing is among blue-collar Chinese workers gaining wider attention for their literary works.

properties.titulo_evento: Tate brothers arrested in US as further UK charges take total to 59
properties.descricao: The Crown Prosecution Service says it has requested their extradition from the US, while their lawyer says they are innocent.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities
properties.descricao: Eight people die and dozens are injured as several cities are hit by missile and drone attacks, while Kyiv continues its own assault on Russian infrastructure.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: US launches fresh strikes as Trump vows revenge
properties.descricao: The US has launched strikes on Iran for a 10th consecutive night as both sides vie for control of the Strait of Hormuz. US President Trump has promised revenge over the deaths of fallen American troops. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia says bus strike kills 5 in border region with Ukraine
properties.descricao: The strike comes as Ukraine launched more than hundreds of drones at Moscow after a Russian missile barrage on Kyiv, as President Zelenskyy sought to calm growing tensions over Ukraine’s military leadership.

properties.titulo_evento: Why a 90-year-old treaty limits NATO in the Black Sea
properties.descricao: A 90-year-old treaty still shapes the balance of power in the Black Sea. As Ukraine fights on against Russia, can NATO project power into waters it can't enter freely?

properties.titulo_evento: Spain won the World Cup, but Donald Trump 'cast a shadow'
properties.descricao: Though Donald Trump mostly stayed clear of stadiums, the World Cup may influence the US midterm elections. DW looks at the political implications of "the most successful sporting event maybe in the history of the world."

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: US conducts strikes for 9th night in a row
properties.descricao: The US launched another wave of attacks against Iran, this time reportedly hitting targets in the northwestern city of Tabriz and elsewhere.

properties.descricao: The Bundesliga has a new home on American screens after Germany's top football league left ESPN. The new deal is a sign of the times.

properties.descricao: The plans come as the U.S. and Russia have failed to come to terms on ending the war in Ukraine.
